opportunities.title: Designer
opportunities.description:
A Note from the Founder

Intelligent Change began as something personal.

Before it was a company, it was a question I was trying to answer in my own life:

Why do we know so much about personal growth, yet struggle to live it consistently?

Over the years, what we created resonated far beyond anything I imagined. Millions of people around the world now use Intelligent Change products as daily rituals to slow down, reflect, and live more intentionally.

opportunities.title: Business Development
opportunities.description:
Business Development (BR)


Timo is a global platform expanding across Southeast Asia, ARC, Brazil, and beyond!

We specialize in chat, party rooms, and gaming, creating engaging social entertainment experiences for users worldwide.

We are looking for an Business Development to manage and grow our network of agencies in Brazil. If you have a passion for operations, partnerships, and strategy, this could be the role for you!


Responsibilities

  • Recruit and onboard agencies and hosts, ensuring performance and engagement targets are met.
